pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + EMA + TTT + Int6 MLP3x (val_bpb=1.1419)

output.summary: 11-layer MLP3x stack uses EMA, XSA on last four layers, and int6+zstd compression, then runs SGD test-time training with frozen early blocks.
techniques: Full-model SGD test-time training (3 epochs, freeze first two blocks) on the dequantized checkpoint
11L MLP3x with EMA and XSA applied to the final four layers
int6 quantization with zstd-22 compression for sub-16MB artifacts
